# watchful-anvil — Workflow Activity Reference

> Curated set of per-package LLM reference files.
> Each file lists all activities, arguments, and properties for one package.

## Packages

- [UiPath.Excel.Activities](https://uips-fixtures.github.io/llms/watchful-anvil/UiPath.Excel.Activities.txt): 3.4.1, 16 activities (UiPath)
- [UiPath.FTP.Activities](https://uips-fixtures.github.io/llms/watchful-anvil/UiPath.FTP.Activities.txt): 2.3.0, 8 activities (UiPath)
- [UiPath.PDF.Activities](https://uips-fixtures.github.io/llms/watchful-anvil/UiPath.PDF.Activities.txt): 3.25.2, 10 activities (UiPath)
- [UiPath.System.Activities](https://uips-fixtures.github.io/llms/watchful-anvil/UiPath.System.Activities.txt): 23.4.5, 77 activities (UiPath)
- [UiPath.UIAutomation.Activities](https://uips-fixtures.github.io/llms/watchful-anvil/UiPath.UIAutomation.Activities.txt): 23.10.20, 75 activities (UiPath)
